rationale: Article VIII, §13 governs tax-sale and redemption procedures for unpaid taxes. It does not set or limit the homestead exemption amount. Increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not conflict with any provision here.
quote: Sec. 13. SALES OF LANDS AND OTHER PROPERTY FOR UNPAID TAXES; REDEMPTION. (a) Provision shall be made by the Legislature for the sale of a sufficient portion of all lands and other property for the taxes due thereon that have not been paid.
_note: No conflict. Tex. Const. art. VIII, §13 addresses tax-sale redemption rights, not homestead exemption amounts. The relevant constitutional provision for exemption amounts is art. VIII, §1-b.
